content.text:
[Chat messages since your last reply - for context] Assistant: 👋 Hi! I'm the Builderz assistant. Ask me anything about our blockchain development services, projects, or how we can help bring your Web3 ideas to life! User: Hi there. How are you doing today? Assistant:

Hey! I’m doing great, thanks for asking 😊
I can help with Builderz-related questions only—services, projects, Web3 development, timelines, pricing, and more.

What would you like to know about Builderz?

User: List name of your major services. Assistant:

Absolutely — our major services are:

  • Blockchain Apps
  • Smart Contracts
  • Design & Brand

If you want, I can also break these down into sub-services (DeFi, NFTs, token design, UI/UX, branding, etc.).

[Current message - respond to this] User: Stands.

Got you 👍  
If you meant **“Thanks”** — you’re welcome!

If you meant **“What does each service stand for?”**, here’s a quick version:

- **Blockchain Apps** → Full Web3 app development (dApps, wallets, dashboards, integrations)  
- **Smart Contracts** → Secure on-chain logic (tokens, DeFi, NFT, audits/testing support)  
- **Design & Brand** → Product/UI UX and visual identity for Web3 products

If you want, I can expand each with deliverables and timelines.
